fields.label: Event
fields.rationale: Event choice is load-bearing. New alerts the approver BEFORE they act. Submit alerts the requester / downstream AFTER approval. Save fires on every draft save (rarely what you want). Days After / Days Before drive date-based reminders. Value Change fires when a specific field mutates.

fields.label: Channel
fields.rationale: Email is the canonical channel and the one most sites have configured. System Notification is free (no SMTP / SMS gateway needed) but users only see it inside Desk.

fields.label: Recipients (list)
fields.rationale: List of recipient rows. Each row is either `receiver_by_document_field` (dynamic: names a link field on the target holding the user, e.g. 'expense_approver'), `{role: '...'}` (static: every user with that role), or `{email: '...'}` (fully static). Dynamic is preferred for per-document routing.

fields.label: Subject (Jinja over doc)
fields.rationale: Jinja-rendered over the target document context. Reference fields with {{ doc.fieldname }}. Empty defaults to a generic system subject.

fields.label: Message body (Jinja HTML)
fields.rationale: Jinja-rendered HTML body. Reference doc fields via {{ doc.<field> }}. Keep short and actionable; the user usually just needs to know what changed and how to act.

fields.label: Condition (Python expression)
fields.rationale: Optional Python expression evaluated against `doc`. Only fires the notification when true. Example: doc.amount > 10000. Empty means always fire.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.rationale: Default to enabled. Use 0 for staging-only notifications.
